utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided as 'Rome, Italy' – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: 'May 5-9, 2024' – specific dates given – fully specified. 3) transportation: 'Budget Airline, Economy Class from London Heathrow (LHR) for 2 adults and 2 children' with costs '€200-€600' – lacks specific flight details (airline name, flight numbers, times) but includes a cost range; the format asks for 'flight details with costs'. Given ambiguity, this is not fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel name, nights, cost per night, total cost – fully specified. 5) activities: list with names and costs – specified, though generic, but meets 'selected activities with costs' – fully specified. 6) additional_services: restaurants as extra services with cost ranges – included with costs – fully specified. 7) total_budget: provided as a range but not a detailed breakdown summing components; the label says 'complete cost breakdown' which implies itemized totals; current entry is a single range without showing how it derives from components – not fully specified. Thus, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 5. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified.
